title: coreopsis repens
intro: Coreopsis repens, also known as creeping coreopsis or prairie coreopsis, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis repens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis repens can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
